codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 1c04ef9 diff plus current user-group API/UI code. Implementation satisfies feature expectations: admin user-group CRUD is permission-gated by can_manage_users, list includes member counts, system groups 1-5 are protected from deletion (and hidden from delete actions in UI), add/edit forms use y/n radio toggles, admin-only permission section is hidden when can_access_admin is No, and group 1 editing is restricted to name/description.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker procedure mandates strict test-first (red/green) for API and UI, but this session was a refinement on pre-existing feature code and added no new tests; procedure guidance appears too rigid for polish/fix-only sessions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff tests.added is empty; commit 1c04ef9 changes only client UI files; transcript skeleton shows validation runs but no new test file creation.

summary: PASS: user-groups-crud behavior is implemented and consistent with the feature contract for this milestone; no blocking or non-blocking code defects found in reviewed scope.
